name: Fruit Chili Relish
recipeIngredient: Peaches or Pears (1 quart), Unpeeled, Chopped (6 or 7 pieces)
Apples (3 cups), Chopped, Unpeeled (6 or 7 pieces)
Medium Onions (5 cups), Peeled, Chopped (12 pieces)
Red Bell Peppers (1 1/4 cups), Chopped and Seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large pot.
2. Cook, uncovered, for 1 1/2 hours or until reduced by half.
3. Add the spice mixture in a cheesecloth bag and the sugar and vinegar.
4. Cook, uncovered, for an additional hour or until quite thick, stirring often.
5. Remove the spice bag and pour into clean, hot preserve jars.
6. Seal according to the jar or lid manufacturer's directions.
YIELD:
7 to 8 pints.
